author: Janilom81
msg:
My 5g router interestingly enough has a really weak signal. 2 bars most of the day and drops internet every other day or so completely for a few minutes. My device connect and disconnect but still maintain above 85% uptime.

Its slow enough for me to switch them to my main wifi to download apk updates. Then I switch back.

author: Janilom81
msg: Maybe uptime is both a blessing and a curse.
